com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXPinList<PIN_TYPE extends IXPin<?>>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAbstractConnector, IXAbstractDevice, IXAbstractPinList, IXBackshell, IXBackshellSymbol, IXBlock, IXComponent, IXConnector, IXConnectorBaseObject, IXDevice, IXDeviceConnector, IXDeviceSymbol, IXElectricalSymbol, IXFunction, IXGround, IXGroundSymbol, IXInterconnectDevice, IXPlatformFunction, IXRefinedConnector, IXRingTerminal, IXSlot, IXSplice, IXSpliceSymbol

    public interface IXPinList<PIN_TYPE extends IXPin<?>>
extends IXWriteableObject
    Base interface representing a generic pin list (e.g. a symbols, a device etc.) owning pins.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<? extends PIN_TYPE> getPins()
      Get the external pins of the pinlist.

    • Method Detail

      • getPins

        java.util.Set<? extends PIN_TYPE> getPins()
        Get the external pins of the pinlist.
        Returns:
        the set of pins owned by this pinlist.
